calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Set For Trial On Sep-28-22 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Continued To Sep-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-29-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Darryl Holcomb, Appellant/Defendant via Zoom phone conference [as stipulated by the Court and both parties].
Darrell Carter, Respondent/Plaintiff appearing in-person.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. The Court confirms with both parties that all exhibits are to be submitted. All parties are sworn.

Darrell Carter, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf.

Darryl Holcomb, Appellant/defendant, testifies on his own behalf.

Darrell Carter, Respondent/Plaintiff, presents rebuttal.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: K.Christal Colobong; Not reported. (D505)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-29-2022 Judgment Entered
